raw_consumer_statement: I made a purchase through XXXX on XXXX using the Wayfair Citi Bank credit card. I never received the service I paid for so I contacted them and filed a dispute for XXXX also had filed disputes for the same purchase with XXXX XXXX XXXXXXXX XXXX XXXX and XXXX. Since then they returned my money but not Wayfair Citi Bank. Wayfair sent me a letter stating the dispute was denied because the merchant from XXXX stated I was friends with the people which was not true. I also filed a police report and they told me the people on XXXX collecting the money were probably involved in a scam and I also reported it to XXXX which they said they were investigating. I had to file another dispute with Wayfair.
